payload.title: [HIGH] No CSRF protection on cookie-authenticated mutations
payload.description: Session is a cookie (scope_session, SameSite=Lax); hostedAuthMiddleware authenticates from it with no CSRF token / Origin / Sec-Fetch-Site check on any state-changing route. /auth/logout and /auth/refresh (mounted before the gate, cookie-only POSTs) are simple-request forgeable from a cross-site auto-submit form (forced logout / refresh-rotation). FIX: require Origin/Sec-Fetch-Site match (or a CSRF token) on cookie-authenticated POST/PATCH/DELETE incl. logout/refresh; consider SameSite=Strict for the session cookie.
